cores.name: Qualified Lead Volume Leakage
cores.leakage_formula_label: (Target Qualified Leads - Actual Qualified Leads) × Target Qualified Lead-to-Win % × Target Average Deal Size

advisory.process: Increase the number of sales-ready leads entering the funnel.
advisory.actions: Review which sources produce genuinely qualified leads, tighten qualification rules, and improve response speed on new enquiries.
advisory.automation: Qualified lead alerts; source quality dashboards; response-time reminders; qualification workflow checks.

cores.name: Qualified Lead-to-Win Conversion Leakage
cores.leakage_formula_label: Actual Qualified Leads × (Target Qualified Lead-to-Win % - Actual Qualified Lead-to-Win %) × Target Average Deal Size

advisory.process: Improve how many qualified leads turn into won deals.
advisory.actions: Review proposal acceptance, loss reasons, stakeholder access, and deal follow-up quality to improve close performance.
advisory.automation: Loss reason capture; deal follow-up reminders; proposal tracking; escalation alerts on stalled deals.

cores.name: Average Deal Size Leakage
cores.leakage_formula_label: Actual Qualified Leads × Actual Qualified Lead-to-Win % × (Target Average Deal Size - Actual Average Deal Size)

advisory.process: Increase the average value of won deals.
advisory.actions: Tighten discounting, improve offer packaging, and raise attach rates on cross-sell and upsell motions.
advisory.automation: Discount alerts; quote review checks; attach-rate dashboards; deal value monitoring.

cores.name: Pricing / Discount Leakage
cores.leakage_formula_label: Actual Revenue Given Away - Allowed Revenue Given Away

advisory.process: Reduce revenue given away through uncontrolled pricing and discounting.
advisory.actions: Check the largest discounts, review quote exceptions, and strengthen approvals on price changes.
advisory.automation: Discount approval workflows; pricing exception alerts; quote audit checks.

cores.name: Unbilled / Uninvoiced Revenue Leakage
cores.leakage_formula_label: Actual Unbilled Revenue - Allowed Unbilled Revenue

advisory.process: Make sure earned revenue is billed quickly and accurately.
advisory.actions: Review completed work not yet billed, improve billing readiness, and tighten handoffs from delivery into invoicing.
advisory.automation: Unbilled revenue alerts; billing readiness dashboards; workflow reminders.

cores.name: Billing Error / Credit Note Leakage
cores.actual_label: Actual Credit Notes and Billing Losses
cores.benchmark_label: Allowed Credit Notes and Billing Losses
cores.leakage_formula_label: Actual Credit Notes and Billing Losses - Allowed Credit Notes and Billing Losses

advisory.process: Reduce revenue lost from incorrect invoices, disputes, and credit notes.
advisory.actions: Review why invoices are being corrected or credited and tighten billing controls upstream.
advisory.automation: Billing error alerts; dispute tracking; credit note approval workflows.

cores.name: Revenue Churn Leakage
cores.leakage_formula_label: Actual Churned Revenue - Allowed Churned Revenue

advisory.process: Protect recurring revenue by reducing avoidable customer loss.
advisory.actions: Review churn reasons, improve renewal discipline, and intervene earlier on at-risk accounts.
advisory.automation: Churn alerts; renewal reminders; customer health dashboards; save-plan workflows.

cores.name: Expansion Revenue Gap
cores.leakage_formula_label: Target Expansion Revenue - Actual Expansion Revenue

advisory.process: Grow more revenue from existing customers.
advisory.actions: Review account plans, target the best expansion opportunities, and strengthen product usage and value realization.
advisory.automation: Expansion alerts; account plan workflows; cross-sell prompts; adoption dashboards.

cores.name: Bad Debt / Collections Leakage
cores.leakage_formula_label: Actual Uncollectable Revenue - Allowed Uncollectable Revenue

advisory.process: Reduce billed revenue that becomes uncollectable.
advisory.actions: Tighten collections, improve dispute handling, and review customers with poor payment behaviour earlier.
advisory.automation: Collections alerts; overdue reminders; bad debt monitoring; dispute workflow automation.
